final:
module top_module(
    output X,
    input A,
    input SLEEP_B,
    input VPWR,
    input KAGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB
);assign X = (A == 1) && (SLEEP_B == 0) && (VPWR > 0) && (KAGND == 0) && (VPB > VNB);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      X <= 0; if (A == 1) begin X <= 1; end else begin X <= 0; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: X <= 0; if (A == 1) begin X <= 1; end else begin X <= 0; end
